directCosineToKnownRelevantCase.title: Wynkoop Fund LP v. ADM Holdings (2021, NY Ct of Appeals)
directCosineToKnownRelevantCase._interpretation: The embeddings themselves are fine. A direct cosine similarity between the question embedding and the known-relevant document's embedding is 0.942. But the filtered S3 Vectors query returned this document's score as absent (not in the returned top-K). The index's HNSW traversal is excluding it due to bridge-node removal under pre-filter.
